query: Use datocms-setup-graphql-types to configure gql.tada for typed DatoCMS GraphQL queries in this Next.js project.
Please invoke datocms-setup-graphql-types and set up GraphQL Code Generator for my DatoCMS query documents.
Run datocms-setup-graphql-types in this Astro repo. I only want typed CDA queries, not CMA schema types.
I want standalone DatoCMS CMA schema types for raw client operations. Use datocms-setup-cma-types.
How do I generate cma-types.ts from my DatoCMS schema with @datocms/cli?
Set up a preview-links endpoint for the DatoCMS Web Previews plugin.
